title: 6 grep and awk Commands for Faster Log Triage
summary: Narrow noisy logs down to the fields that matter with grep and awk commands for error sampling, timeout checks, status-path extraction, and quick counts.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with grep and awk

verification_setup: Confirm grep and awk are installed.
Replace the example log file names and field positions before running the commands.
Use logs that contain known error, timeout, and completion patterns.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/grep_and_awk_commands_for_faster_log_triage.sh with real local logs.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Spot-checked locally with disposable sample logs matching the documented field positions. Replace the example files and field references to fit your log format.
